1.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 1 (photosystem I and II)
1.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I and II components (p=1.50E-09 and 2.50E-05 respectively). Includes genes related to photosystem I and II such as psbA, psbD, and psaA.
1.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression around mid-day (8.3 h in the paper's time scale) with 24h periodicity, co-varying with light intensity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Expression of approximately half of photosystem (PS) II genes, including reaction center genes psbA and psbD, peak in abundance at mid-day

Periodicity patterns of photosynthesis genes fell into 4 clusters (Table 1). Expression of approximately half of photosystem (PS) II genes, including reaction center genes psbA and psbD (encoding D1 and D2 respectively), as well as psbC (CP43) and psbF, co-varied with light intensity, with maxima at mid-day, and minima in the middle of the night (Figure 4A, Table S4)

13.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 13 (ribosomal proteins)
13.functional_description: Enriched for ribosomal proteins (p=3.70E-41). Includes 45 out of 53 ribosomal protein genes.
13.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 3.4 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 13 is enriched for ribosomal proteins (45/53 genes, p=3.70E-41)

16.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 16 (ATP synthase and CO2 metabolism)
16.functional_description: Enriched for ATP synthase (8/8 genes, p=8.40E-08) and CO2 metabolism genes (7/9 genes, p=1.80E-05).
16.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 5.5 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 16 is enriched for ATP synthase (8/8 genes, p=8.40E-08) and CO2 metabolism (7/9 genes, p=1.80E-05)

18.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 18 (menaquinone and ubiquinone)
18.functional_description: Enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045).
18.temporal_pattern: Non-expressed gene cluster per Table 1 classification.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 18 is enriched for menaquinone and ubiquinone genes (6/9 genes, p=0.00045)

3.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 3 (cytochrome b6/f and photosystem II)
3.functional_description: Enriched for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.0059) and photosystem II genes (8/22 genes, p=3.70E-08).
3.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 12.5 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 3 is enriched for cytochrome b6/f (3/7 genes, p=0.0059) and photosystem II genes (8/22 genes, p=3.70E-08)

4.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 4 (cytochrome b6/f)
4.functional_description: Enriched for cytochrome b6/f genes (3/7 genes, p=0.073).
4.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 15.8 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 4 is enriched for cytochrome b6/f genes (3/7 genes, p=0.073)

4.assessment_notes: Enrichment p-value marginally above significance threshold.

5.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 5 (respiratory terminal oxidases and protein degradation)
5.functional_description: Enriched for respiratory terminal oxidases (3/3 genes, p=0.019) and degradation of proteins, peptides, and glycopeptides (5/15 genes, p=0.071).
5.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 17.5 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.
5.enrichment_category: Respiratory terminal oxidases and protein degradation

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 5 is enriched for respiratory terminal oxidases (3/3 genes, p=0.019) and degradation of proteins, peptides, and glycopeptides (5/15 genes, p=0.071)

6.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 6 (purine ribonucleotide biosynthesis)
6.functional_description: Enriched for purine ribonucleotide biosynthesis genes (7/18 genes, p=0.0049).
6.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 18.6 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 6 is enriched for purine ribonucleotide biosynthesis genes (7/18 genes, p=0.0049)

7.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 7 (nitrogen metabolism)
7.functional_description: Enriched for nitrogen metabolism genes (4/8 genes, p=0.087).
7.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 20.1 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 7 is enriched for nitrogen metabolism genes (4/8 genes, p=0.087)

7.assessment_notes: Enrichment p-value marginally above significance threshold.

8.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 8 (chaperones)
8.functional_description: Enriched for chaperone genes (7/14 genes, p=0.00023).
8.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 21.0 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 8 is enriched for chaperone genes (7/14 genes, p=0.00023)

9.name: Prochlorococcus cluster 9 (RNA synthesis, modification, and DNA transcription)
9.functional_description: Enriched for RNA synthesis, modification, and DNA transcription genes (6/23 genes, p=0.035).
9.temporal_pattern: Genes peak in expression near 22.4 hours after onset of dark with 24h periodicity.
9.enrichment_category: RNA synthesis, modification, and DNA transcription

supporting_quotes.quote: Cluster 9 is enriched for RNA synthesis, modification, and DNA transcription genes (6/23 genes, p=0.035)
